resources.title: Local-first software: You own your data, in spite of the cloud
resources.note: Foundational framing for ownership, sync, and collaboration without making cloud services the source of truth.
resources.preview: Ink & Switch research essay on local-first principles.

resources.title: Charmbracelet Bubble Tea
resources.note: Good reference for composable terminal UI ergonomics and command loops.
resources.preview: A powerful little TUI framework for Go.

resources.title: The Extended Mind
resources.note: Relevant to the app's purpose: offloading memory and arranging external systems for thought.
resources.preview: Annie Murphy Paul on thinking outside the brain.

resources.title: Raft paper notes
resources.note: Summarize leader election mechanics and what makes Raft easier to explain than Paxos.

resources.title: GitHub command palette and create menu
resources.note: Header pattern to borrow: dense utility without turning every action into a top-level button.
resources.preview: Navigation reference for compact private app chrome.

resources.title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
resources.note: Re-read chapters on replication and partitioning before making persistence choices.

resources.title: Automerge docs
resources.note: Potential model for future offline capture and sync if this becomes more than a Vercel app.

resources.note: Study configuration shape and extension points for plugin-driven tools.
